title: Creamy Crumble Coffee Cake
description: A delicious and moist coffee cake topped with a crunchy crumble and creamy frosting.
instructions: 2. In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, and crumb topping.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the softened butter, eggs, and vanilla extract.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 9x13 inch baking dish.
6. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
7. Allow the coffee cake to cool before frosting.
8. Whisk the heavy cream and frosting together in a bowl until smooth.
9. Spread the frosting over the cooled coffee cake.
10. Refrigerate for 30 minutes to allow the frosting to set.
